raw_pdf.source_role: manually downloaded source PDF; body not opened by default

appendix_normalization.source_role: hand-normalized online-appendix formula inventory when present

implementation_cross_check.source_role: MMB implementation cross-check only; not paper-side mathematical source

notes: Primary Markdown contains the analytical model equations and the fiscal information-flow rules.
The full NK model is described at block level in the paper-side Markdown; detailed NK equations are not fully printed there.
No PDF body was opened; raw PDF existence was checked only for provenance.
Implementation cross-check confirms model(linear), variable names, shock names, timing conventions, and equation coverage, but was not treated as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only; user explicitly said not to run Dynare.

catalog_cross_reference.reason: User assigned only the model folder and explicitly prohibited editing shared catalog.csv or status.csv.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
